'''Skalokor''' was the second [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Yabosta]].

==Description and history==
The moon was covered in forests and treacherous mountains, and was inhabited by the [[Dolandu]], a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of white-furred [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]]. One trading settlement on the moon was [[Stomorr]]. It was once attacked by forces under command of the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] apprentice [[Von Totha]] who wanted to kill a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] that lived near the village. That Jedi Master, [[Niquon]], defeated all of Totha's forces except for a [[Drethi/Legends|drethi]], a winged creature with [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-targeting poison. The drethi was finally defeated by Niquon's [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] learner [[Nason Laric]].
